channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Dennis Mchanga: Blending Animation and Storytelling to Preserve Tanzanian History
item.description: Dennis Mchanga is a Tanzanian animator who uses his craft to preserve history and reclaim cultural identity. Unlike traditional animators focused on cartoons, he blends filmmaking and animation to tel...

item.title: Delhi and Bombay High Courts Establish Fast-Track Courts for Paper Leak Cases Following Modi's Directive
item.description: The Delhi and Bombay High Courts have established special fast-track courts to address cases related to question paper leaks and other malpractices in public examinations. This decision follows Prime ...

item.title: Pakistan, Iran, and US Commit to Strengthen Ties Under Islamabad MoU to Ensure Regional Peace
item.description: Pakistan, Iran, and the United States have emphasized the importance of maintaining close coordination and dialogue to achieve lasting regional peace and stability. During a meeting between Deputy Pri...

item.title: Parent-Child Interaction Therapy: Enhancing Parenting Skills and Child Behavior
item.description: Parent-child interaction therapy (PCIT) is an evidence-based approach that helps parents manage challenging behaviors in children by fostering authoritative parenting. The therapy, rooted in attachmen...

item.title: Carney's Initiative to Attract $1 Trillion in Foreign Investment Over Two Days
item.description: Prime Minister Mark Carney is spearheading the Canada Investment Summit, aiming to reverse a $1 trillion loss in foreign capital over the past decade. The Royal Bank of Canada reported that for every ...

item.title: News Corp Australia blocks crawler bots with technical safeguards
item.description: The article explains that News Corp Australia has implemented software to manage crawler bot traffic on its websites. If users encounter a message indicating they've been blocked as a crawler bot, the...

item.title: Kenyan Football Coach Juma Abdalla Dies After Battle With Illness, Leaves Legacy
item.description: Veteran Kenyan football coach Juma Abdalla passed away on Friday, July 25, 2026, after a prolonged battle with diabetes and pancreatic cancer. The 71-year-old coach was buried in Murang'a town followi...

item.title: The Strokes Perform 'Dine N’Dash' Live at Red Rocks During 'Reality Awaits' Album Launch
item.description: The Strokes have made their first live performance of the track 'Dine N’Dash' during their second night at Red Rocks, Colorado, as part of their North American tour celebrating their new album 'Realit...

item.title: Ageism in Job Hunting: A 55-Year-Old's Struggle to Find Work
item.description: Leslie Sonnenklar, a 55-year-old communications professional from Phoenix, Arizona, shares her harrowing experience navigating the modern job market. Laid off in March 2025, she has applied to over 30...

item.title: Nigeria's 2026 WAFCON Campaign: Ambitions for World Cup and $2M Prize
item.description: Nigeria, the reigning WAFCON champions, are set to defend their title at the 2026 Women’s Africa Cup of Nations (WAFCON) in Morocco. The tournament, featuring 16 teams, offers a record $2M prize for t...

item.title: Cartoonist Aaron Billings critiques Barnaby Joyce's outburst in new political cartoon
item.description: The article features a political cartoon by Aaron Billings, depicting Barnaby Joyce in a confrontational scene with a dog. The piece critiques Joyce's public behaviour, with Billings using humour to h...

item.title: Man with History of Legal Troubles and Mental Health Struggles Faces New Charges
item.description: The article details the life of a man named Truelove, who has faced numerous legal and mental health challenges over the past two decades. Truelove, who has accumulated over 40 charges and citations, ...

item.title: Trump Shifts Support to JD Vance Amid Weight Loss and Media Appearances
item.description: President Donald Trump has shifted his focus from evaluating Vice President JD Vance and Secretary of State Marco Rubio as potential 2028 successors to openly endorsing Vance. This change, according t...

item.title: US Imposes 12.5% Tariff on Nigerian Exports Under Section 301 Trade Policy
item.description: The United States has introduced a 12.5% tariff on Nigerian exports as part of a broader trade policy targeting countries that fail to enforce prohibitions on goods made with forced labor. This decisi...

item.title: Canada's Trade and Security Agreements: Balancing Global Alliances and National Interests
item.description: The article critiques Prime Minister Mark Carney's aggressive pursuit of international trade and security partnerships, highlighting the risks and moral dilemmas associated with these agreements. It e...

item.title: NBI Investigates Financial Anomalies in SEA Games Hosting
item.description: The National Bureau of Investigation (NBI) has formally requested documents and reports from the Commission on Audit (COA) and Securities and Exchange Commission (SEC) to investigate alleged irregular...

item.title: Business Day Seeks Experienced News Editor to Lead Journalism Team
item.description: Arena Holdings, through its publication Business Day, is recruiting a senior news editor to spearhead impactful journalism in South Africa. The role involves strategic leadership in shaping editorial ...

item.title: Security forces kill 12 militants in response to KP checkpost attack
item.description: Security forces in Khyber Pakhtunkhwa's Tank district successfully neutralized 12 militants linked to India-backed Fitna al-Khawarij following a terrorist attack on a joint police checkpost. The attac...

item.title: Ochilo Ayacko Criticised After Statement on Obado Conviction Omits Sharon Otieno's Family
item.description: Migori Governor Ochilo Ayacko has come under widespread criticism following a public statement issued after the High Court convicted former Migori Governor Okoth Obado, his former personal assistant M...

item.title: Haitian Immigrants Face Uncertainty as TPS Deadline Looms for Elderly Care Workers
item.description: The article details the plight of Sabine French, a first-generation Haitian American, and her elderly mother, who face uncertainty as the Temporary Protected Status (TPS) for Haitians expires. The dea...
